description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a straight, light brown wooden handle with visible wood grain texture. The head is made of dark metal and consists of a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side for nail removal. The handle appears smooth and slightly tapered for a comfortable grip, with no additional grip enhancements. The metal head is robust and solid, with a matte finish and no visible rust or damage. The overall design is utilitarian and typical for use in construction, carpentry, or general urban maintenance tasks.
description: A traditional claw hammer with a smooth wooden handle and a dark metal head featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the profile of the metal head with both the striking face and claw visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the oval cross-section of the handle and the split claw of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle and the metal head, with the striking face and claw visible from the other side.
description_view_3: View from the handle end, showing the width of the handle and the open split of the claw head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with visible grain, smooth surface, no additional grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head made of dark steel, featuring a flat striking face and a curved, split claw for nail removal.
